arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Elastic IP.

association_id.description: The ID representing the association of the Elastic IP with an instance or network interface.

carrier_ip.description: The Carrier IP address associated with the Elastic IP, if applicable.

customer_owned_ip.description: The customer-owned IP address associated with the Elastic IP, if applicable.

customer_owned_ipv4_pool.description: The ID of the customer-owned IPv4 pool from which the IP address is allocated.

domain.description: Indicates whether the Elastic IP is for EC2 Classic or VPC.

id.description: The ID of the Elastic IP.

instance_id.description: The ID of the instance the Elastic IP is associated with, if applicable.

ipam_pool_id.description: The ID of the IP Address Manager (IPAM) pool used for this Elastic IP.

network_interface_id.description: The ID of the network interface the Elastic IP is associated with, if applicable.

network_interface_owner_id.description: The ID of the owner of the network interface associated with the Elastic IP.

private_dns.description: The private DNS name associated with the Elastic IP, if applicable.

private_ip.description: The private IP address associated with the Elastic IP, if applicable.

ptr_record.description: The pointer (PTR) record for reverse DNS lookup associated with the Elastic IP.

public_dns.description: The public DNS name associated with the Elastic IP.

public_ip.description: The public IP address of the Elastic IP.

public_ipv4_pool.description: The ID of the public IPv4 pool from which the IP address is allocated.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Elastic IP.
